name: China Investment Fund Company Limited
summary: China Ding Yi Feng Holdings Limited is a publicly owned investment manager. The firm invests in the private equity, and venture capital markets across the globe. The firm also invests in e-commerce & internet services and high technology industry. The firm seeks to invest in listed and unlisted companies in the PRC and Hong Kong. The firm employs a combination of quantitative and qualitative analysis to create its investment portfolios. It was formerly known as China Investment Fund International Holdings Limited. China Ding Yi Feng Holdings Limited was established in 2001 and is based in Wanchai, Hong Kong.
